offer: For property managers managing 5–15 rental units, inconsistent reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automatically generate monthly property management reports instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent and delayed reporting to landlords
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on reporting tools
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for property management
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
